tasks.subject: T1: Ledger.touch for in-place entry updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `Ledger.touch(instance_id, *, last_heartbeat=None, **extra) -> bool` for strict-update mutation of an existing ledger entry under the existing cross-process lock. No upsert. Skip-unchanged guard. Protected keys filtered.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/core/test_ledger_touch.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/lifecycle.py` (+~30 LOC near line 506)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- unknown id returns False, no entry appended
- existing id + new heartbeat returns True, value persisted
- unchanged value returns False, zero disk writes
- all-None kwargs returns False, lock never acquired
- protected keys (id/provider/tags/created_at/cost_rate_usd_per_hr) filtered from **extra
- lock acquired with key f"ledger/{run_id}" and ttl mutate_ttl_s
- subprocess test: value crosses process boundary
- forget+touch race: touch on forgotten id returns False, does not resurrect

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_ledger_touch.py -x -v && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/lifecycle.py", "tests/core/test_ledger_touch.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_ledger_touch.py -x -v && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unknown id no-op", "existing id persists", "unchanged value zero writes", "all-None no-op no lock", "protected keys filtered", "lock key + ttl correct", "cross-process visibility", "forget+touch no resurrect"]}
```

tasks.subject: T2: HeartbeatLoop threaded poll with crash-safe try/except + sentinel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New `core/heartbeat_loop.py` with `HeartbeatLoop` class — threaded periodic poll that calls `provider.heartbeat(id)` then `ledger.touch(id, hb, heartbeat_thread_tick=now)` on a configured cadence. Three-layer crash-safety defense (inner try/except + sentinel + daemon thread).

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_loop.py` (~120 LOC)
- Create: `tests/core/test_heartbeat_loop.py` (~250 LOC)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- one tick calls provider.heartbeat then ledger.touch once
- first tick is eager (no sleep)
- provider.heartbeat exception caught + logged at ERROR; next tick still runs
- ledger.touch exception caught + logged at ERROR; next tick still runs
- sentinel heartbeat_thread_tick advances monotonically
- stop() during inter-tick sleep returns within join_timeout_s
- stop() on wedged thread returns within join_timeout_s + slack (daemon)
- two concurrent loops on different ids do not collide

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_heartbeat_loop.py -x -v && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_loop.py", "tests/core/test_heartbeat_loop.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_heartbeat_loop.py -x -v && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-tick provider+ledger calls", "eager first tick", "provider exception caught + logged", "ledger exception caught + logged", "sentinel monotonic", "stop joins in time mid-sleep", "stop joins in time on wedged thread", "two loops isolated"]}
```

tasks.subject: T4: LifecycleConfig.heartbeat_interval_s
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `heartbeat_interval_s: float | None = None` field to `LifecycleConfig` with positive-value validator. Default None (feature disabled, backwards-compat).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py` (+~10 LOC on LifecycleConfig)
- Modify: `tests/core/test_config.py` (+~40 LOC)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- default None
- positive float accepted
- ValidationError on negative or zero
- YAML round-trip lifecycle.heartbeat_interval_s = 30 -> cfg.lifecycle().heartbeat_interval_s == 30.0

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -x -v && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -x -v && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default None", "positive float accepted", "negative rejected", "YAML round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: T3: deploy_session spawns HeartbeatLoop when configured
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `HeartbeatLoop` into `deploy_session` context manager — spawn on enter when `cfg.lifecycle().heartbeat_interval_s` is set, stop on exit (even on exception). Add injectable `heartbeat_loop_factory` kwarg for test substitution.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py` (deploy_session +~15 LOC near 483-495)
- Create: `tests/core/test_orchestrator_heartbeat.py` (~180 LOC)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- interval=None: factory spy never called
- interval=X: factory instantiated, start() then stop() in correct order
- exception inside ctx body still triggers stop() in finally
- factory seam supports test substitution (custom factory receives expected kwargs)
- end-to-end real HeartbeatLoop + FakeClock: after 2 ticks ledger has last_heartbeat + heartbeat_thread_tick

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_heartbeat.py -x -v && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_heartbeat.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_heartbeat.py -x -v && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["interval None no spawn", "interval set spawn+start+stop sequence", "exit on body raise still stops", "factory seam substitution", "e2e ledger write"]}
```

tasks.subject: T5: kinoforge status surfaces last_heartbeat + sentinel-staleness advisory
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `_cmd_status` to emit a sentinel-staleness advisory when heartbeat_thread_tick is older than 3 * heartbeat_interval_s. The last_heartbeat surfacing already works via Layer S `_build_ledger_block`; tests pin it down.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` (+~10 LOC in _cmd_status)
- Modify: `tests/test_cli.py` (+~60 LOC)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- surfaces last_heartbeat=<ISO> when present in entry
- omits last_heartbeat line when absent (negative regression guard)
- emits advisory when sentinel > 3 * interval old
- no advisory when sentinel is fresh

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_cli.py -x -v -k status && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/test_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_cli.py -x -v -k status && pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["surfaces last_heartbeat", "omits when absent", "advisory when stale", "no advisory when fresh"]}
```

tasks.subject: T6: Layer U docs + manual smoke + merge to main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Documentation (README + PROGRESS + example yaml), manual smoke (LocalProvider only), final pre-commit + pytest gate, merge to main via --no-ff.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md` (Operator section: heartbeat_interval_s, guidance, sentinel-gate forward-compat note)
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` (Phase entry with SHAs of T1-T5 + merge)
- Modify: `examples/configs/local-fake.yaml` (heartbeat_interval_s comment under lifecycle:)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README operator section added
- PROGRESS phase entry written with SHAs backfilled
- example yaml comment added
- manual smoke run + recorded (status surfaces last_heartbeat, advisory fires on SIGSTOP)
- full test suite green; pre-commit clean
- merge commit message references Layer U, closes PROGRESS:162 forward-compat seam

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && git log --oneline -10`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md", "examples/configs/local-fake.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README updated", "PROGRESS phase entry", "example yaml comment", "manual smoke recorded", "full suite green + pre-commit clean", "merge to main no-ff"]}
```
